name.title: Name
name.description: The name of your air purifier as it will appear in HomeKit

host.title: IP Address
host.description: IP address of your Philips Air Purifier

pythonPath.title: Python Path (Optional)
pythonPath.description: Path to Python 3 with aiocoap and pycryptodomex installed. Leave blank to use the plugin's bundled virtual environment (recommended).

items.description: Only needed if the auto-detected Python does not have the required dependencies
